Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
ca.yorku.cmg.cnsim.engine.transaction.Transaction
public class Transaction extends Object
Represents a transaction in the CNSim simulation engine.

A transaction encapsulates core properties including a unique identifier, creation time, monetary value, and size in bytes. Each transaction may optionally be associated with a specific node where it first appears in the network.

This class provides static ID management for generating unique transaction identifiers across the simulation and supports tracking whether a transaction causes seed changes in the consensus protocol.

Version:
1.0
Author:
CNSim Development Team

    Whether this transaction changes the simulation seed.

    value

  • Constructor Details

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(long ID, long time, float value, float size)
      Creates a transaction with fields initialized

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires time >= 0;
   //@ requires value >= 0;
   //@ requires size >= 0;
   //@ ensures this.ID == ID;
   //@ ensures this.creationTime == time;
   //@ ensures this.value == value;
   //@ ensures this.size == size;
      Parameters:
      ID - the ID of the transaction
      time - the simulation time the transaction is created
      value - the value of the transaction in local currency
      size - the size of the transaction in bytes
      Throws:
      ArithmeticException - if time < 0 (precondition violated)
      ArithmeticException - if value < 0 (precondition violated)
      ArithmeticException - if size < 0 (precondition violated)

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(long ID, long time, float value, float size, int nodeID)
      Creates a transaction with all mandatory fields initialized plus a node id.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires time >= 0;
   //@ requires value >= 0;
   //@ requires size >= 0;
   //@ ensures this.ID == ID;
   //@ ensures this.creationTime == time;
   //@ ensures this.value == value;
   //@ ensures this.size == size;
   //@ ensures this.nodeID == nodeID;
      Parameters:
      ID - the ID of the transaction
      time - the simulation time the transaction is created
      value - the value of the transaction in local currency
      size - the size of the transaction in bytes
      nodeID - the ID of the node where the transaction is supposed to show up (-1 if no node is defined yet)
      Throws:
      ArithmeticException - if time < 0 (precondition violated)
      ArithmeticException - if value < 0 (precondition violated)
      ArithmeticException - if size < 0 (precondition violated)

    • Transaction

      public Transaction()
      Creates an empty transaction.

      ID, time, value and size must be initialized with setters.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures true;

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(long id)
      Creates an empty transaction with a given ID.

      Time, value and size must be initialized with setters.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures this.ID == id;
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the transaction

  • Method Details

    • makeSeedChanging

      public void makeSeedChanging()
      Marks this transaction as seed-changing.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures this.seedChanging == true;

    • isSeedChanging

      public boolean isSeedChanging()
      Indicates whether this transaction is seed-changing.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == this.seedChanging;
      Returns:
      true if this transaction is seed-changing; false otherwise

    • getNextTxID

      public static int getNextTxID()
      Gets the next available ID number to assign to a transaction.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == \old(currID);
   //@ ensures currID == \old(currID) + 1;
      Returns:
      the next transaction ID number

    • resetCurrID

      public static void resetCurrID()
      Resets the next available ID to 1.

      To be used for moving to the next experiment.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures currID == 1;

    • getCreationTime

      public long getCreationTime()
      Returns the simulation time the transaction was created.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == this.creationTime;
      Returns:
      the simulation time the transaction was created

    • getValue

      public float getValue()
      Returns the value of the transaction in the native currency.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == this.value;
      Returns:
      the value of the transaction in the native currency

    • setValue

      public void setValue(float value)
      Sets the value of the transaction in the native currency.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires value >= 0;
   //@ ensures this.value == value;
      Parameters:
      value - the value of the transaction in the native currency
      Throws:
      ArithmeticException - if value < 0 (precondition violated)

    • setSize

      public void setSize(float size)
      Sets the size of the transaction in bytes.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires size >= 0;
   //@ ensures this.size == size;
      Parameters:
      size - the size of the transaction in bytes
      Throws:
      ArithmeticException - if size < 0 (precondition violated)

    • getSize

      public float getSize()
      Returns the size of the transaction in bytes.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == this.size;
      Returns:
      the size of the transaction in bytes

    • setID

      public void setID(long ID)
      Sets the unique ID of the transaction.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures this.ID == ID;
      Parameters:
      ID - the ID of the transaction

    • getID

      public long getID()
      Returns the unique id of the transaction.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == this.ID;
      Returns:
      the unique id of the transaction

    • getNodeID

      public int getNodeID()
      Returns the id of the node where the transaction first appears.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures \result == this.nodeID;
      Returns:
      the id of the node where the transaction first appears; -1 if unspecified

    • setNodeID

      public void setNodeID(int nodeID)
      Sets the id of the node where the transaction first appears.

      JML Contract:

         //@ requires true;
   //@ ensures this.nodeID == nodeID;
      Parameters:
      nodeID - the id of the node where the transaction first appears
